arts.ttl: Palace sign Millwall's Esse on contract until 2030
arts.sum: Crystal Palace complete their first signing of the January transfer window as Millwall winger Romain Esse, 19, joins on a deal until 2030.

arts.ttl: Club reach agreement with West Ham for player overnight – Ditching loan to head elsewhere
arts.sum: West Ham United have reached an agreement with Genoa for Maxwel Cornet to head there this month. That’s according to Gianluca di Marzio, who reports that the winger will be heading to Italy after ditching a loan spell at Southampton. According to his information Genoa have an agreement with West Ham for Cornet. arts.ttl: Newcastle United swooping in to try and beat Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace to signing
arts.sum: Multiple transfer situations are turning into dramas as the window grows older and added stress is poured over ongoing sagas. Luiz Henrique is very much in one of those situations. arts.ttl: West Ham agree deal for left winger with 99 G/A contributions
arts.sum: There’s not much time left in the winter transfer window for Graham Potter and the West Ham board to execute any transfer business, but one deal that has been done concerns a left winger with 99 goal or assist contributions. Barcelona’s Ansu Fati is ready to move to West Ham, and Ben Chilwell could join […] The post West Ham agree deal for left winger with 99 G/A contributions appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace sign midfielder Esse from Millwall
arts.sum: Born in Lambeth, south east London, Esse is a product of Millwall's academy, and made his Lions debut as a 17-year-old against Watford on Boxing Day in 2022. Crystal Palace have signed attacking midfielder Romain Esse, the club's first acquisition of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace may need to react to sign €15m Frenchman – Ligue 1 side to make first move
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Crystal Palace continue to show interest in Trabzonspor midfielder Batista Mendy, but face competition from other clubs. The 24-year-old was a reported target for the Eagles during the last summer window and he’s continued to be linked with a move to Selhurst Park. arts.ttl: Palace sign Romain Esse from Millwall
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have completed the signing of exciting teenage talent Romain Esse from Millwall.

arts.ttl: Esse’s first Palace TV interview: ‘I can’t wait’
arts.sum: In his first interview as a Crystal Palace player, Romain Esse says he ‘can’t wait’ to play for the club – and says he looks forward to showing supporters what he’s all about.
